data.title: Polkadot aims for $2.40 rebound despite weakness, with 38% upside potential indicated by technical analysis. Support at $1.71 crucial.
data.description: Forecasts indicate that the price of DOT is expected to rebound to $2.40 in the next 2-4 weeks, driven by bullish divergence in the MACD histogram. However, it is crucial to note that the immediate support level at $1.71 will play a vital role in the price movement.

data.title: NFT collections see market hit all-time low in 2025, with decrease in buyers, sellers, and transactions.
data.description: Data from the market indicated a decrease in activity within the NFT space, as the number of buyers, sellers, and transactions has declined. This trend suggests a waning interest in speculative investments related to NFTs.

data.title: MATIC expected to surge 32% to $0.50 in 4 weeks, testing key resistance at $0.35, with targets at $0.45-$0.58.
data.description: The MATIC price is predicted to potentially rise by 32%, reaching $0.50, based on technical analysis for Polygon. The analysis indicates oversold conditions near the $0.35 support level, with medium-term targets set between $0.45 and $0.58.

data.title: Tesla's self-driving taxis excite Wall St. soaring high in shares, despite lagging far behind Waymo, with a significant head start.
data.description: Tesla's stock has reached record highs fueled by optimism surrounding their self-driving taxi initiative. However, industry experts indicate that Tesla is significantly lagging behind Waymo, emphasizing the latter's substantial lead in autonomous technology development. This development showcases Tesla's ongoing efforts to innovate in the self-driving car space, despite being overshadowed by competitors like Waymo.

data.title: Students are learning to navigate social media and AI in a new class as technology poses new challenges for critical thinking online.
data.description: Efforts to educate the digital generation on critical thinking and online safety face challenges with the introduction of new technologies.

data.title: DOGE expected to reach $0.126 after RSI oversold at 39, from current $0.13 level, within a week. Bullish trend noted.
data.description: Positive signals are seen in Dogecoin as the MACD histogram is in the bullish zone and the RSI stands at 39. The cryptocurrency aims for a short-term rebound to reach $0.126 from its current level of $0.13, indicating a potential increase within a week.

data.title: SOL set to reach $130 by January 2026 despite bearish signals, with key support at $116.88. #cryptocurrency #prediction
data.description: Forecasters are predicting that the price of SOL could rise to $130 in the next month, even though current technical signals are bearish. The key support level to watch is at $116.88, as it will play a crucial role in determining whether this projection becomes reality.

data.title: XRP projected to reach $2.35-$2.88 by year-end despite current weakness, supported by oversold technical indicators.
data.description: The forecast for XRP indicates a possible rebound to a range of $2.35 to $2.88 by December 31st. This potential recovery is supported by technical analysis pointing to oversold conditions close to key support levels.

data.title: BNB price predicted to hit $1,000 in 4 weeks, currently consolidating near $840 with breakout expected above $920.
data.description: Predictions are indicating that the price of BNB is expected to reach $1,000 within the next four weeks. Currently, the price is consolidating around $840, positioning for a potential bullish breakout above the resistance level of $920. This potential increase represents a significant jump from the current price.

data.title: ETH expected to reach $3,200-$3,300 by Jan 2026 amid bullish signals. Targets can be hit in 4-6 weeks if resistance breaks.
data.description: The cryptocurrency Ethereum is currently experiencing a positive uptrend, as indicated by the MACD turning upwards. Analysts predict that the price of ETH could hit targets between $3,200 and $3,300 within the next 4 to 6 weeks, provided it breaks through key resistance levels.

data.title: Crypto M&A reaches record $8.6B in 2025 with soaring deal numbers, led by Coinbase's acquisition of Deribit.
data.description: Cryptocurrency transactions witnessed a significant surge this year, with the number of deals reportedly increasing. The total value of these deals reached a record high of $8.6 billion. The most notable transaction was Coinbase's acquisition of Deribit, setting a new record in the cryptocurrency industry.
